name: sextant
description: Health-aware codebase intelligence for LLM coding agents

scripts.test: node --test test/*.test.js test/extractors/*.test.js && bash scripts/test-refresh.sh && bash scripts/test-scoring.sh && bash scripts/test-rg.sh && bash scripts/test-watcher.sh && bash scripts/test-corrupt-recovery.sh && node scripts/eval-retrieve.js
scripts.test:integration: bash scripts/test-refresh.sh && bash scripts/test-scoring.sh && bash scripts/test-rg.sh && bash scripts/test-watcher.sh && bash scripts/test-corrupt-recovery.sh
